",{"type":25,"children":["loweCamelCase"]}," is only for overriding methods and protocol-defined fields, nothing else."]},{"type":2,"children":["Alignment"],"level":2,"anchor":"alignment"},{"type":3,"children":["Don’t align in leading whitespace regions such as ",{"type":25,"children":["dict"]}," and ",{"type":25,"children":["list"]}," literals, long function calls, and function declarations."]},{"type":3,"children":["Small one liner literals are fine. Use namespaces or submodules for that."]},{"type":3,"children":["Don’t put blank lines between nested block creations, such as:"]},{"type":15,"children":["class Test:  # no newline now\n\tdef __init__(self):\n\t\tpass\n\ndef read_stuff():\n\twith open('stuff') as f:\n\t\treturn f.read()\n"],"pos":{"line":100,"column":1}},{"type":2,"children":["Indent blank lines"],"level":2,"anchor":"indent-blank-lines"},{"type":3,"children":["Indent empty lines to the same level as surrounding lines.","That way you have visually uniform blocks when making whitespace visible."]},{"type":3,"children":["Also you don’t have to rely on your editor to remove “trailing whitespace” when editing/saving.","E.g. the workflow of adding a new line of code between the following lines:"]},{"type":15,"children":["def foo():\n\tline1\n\t\n\tline2\n"],"pos":{"line":118,"column":1}},{"type":3,"children":["With unindented empty lines:"]},{"type":3,"children":[":\t1. Rely on your editor to remove the whitespace in the blank line"]},{"type":3,"children":["With indented empty lines:"]},{"type":3,"children":[":\t1. Press return","3. input code","4. press return"]},{"type":3,"children":["The latter has less editor magic and more control, and, as said, is more consistent with your block structure."]},{"type":2,"children":["No limit on line length"],"level":2,"anchor":"no-limit-on-line-length"},{"type":3,"children":["If a line gets longer than ~120 chars, though, the code could be overly complex.","So consider breaking it up for clarity, e.g. by extracting a variable or putting the parts of a long boolean expression on separate lines."]},{"type":2,"children":["Comparisons"],"level":2,"anchor":"comparisons"},{"type":3,"children":["Compare ",{"type":25,"children":["None"]}," using ",{"type":25,"children":["is"]},":"]},{"type":15,"children":["if param is None:\n\tparam = []\n"],"pos":{"line":151,"column":1}},{"type":3,"children":["Never compare booleans using ",{"type":25,"children":["=="]}," or ",{"type":25,"children":["!="]},".","Use boolean logic like ",{"type":25,"children":["and"]},", ",{"type":25,"children":["or"]},", ",{"type":25,"children":["not"]},", ",{"type":25,"children":["any"]}," and ",{"type":25,"children":["all"]}," instead, and use the truthiness of everything; e.g. use ",{"type":25,"children":["if my_list"]}," instead of comparing its length to 0."]}],"metadata":{}}
